description.value: Price 9,200 gp; Slot belt; CL 7th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration and necromancy DESCRIPTION This belt functions as a normal channel-thieving belt, except the amount of healing is equal to 1/2 the amount of damage healed or dealt by the creature channeling energy. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,600 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells cure serious wounds, inflict serious wounds
